title: Deeply Religious (album)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Deeply Religious''''' was a self-titled compilation album by the band [[Deeply Religious]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II||'Just Another Art Form'}}</ref> that was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> This was the first appearance of the song "[[Just Another Art Form]]."<ref name="CSWE" />

==Track listing==
*"[[Deeply Religious (song)|Deeply Religious]]"
*"[[Freedom of Speech]]"
*"[[Gamorrean Hard Case]]"
*"[[Just Another Art Form]]"
*"[[Saving the Universe (Again)]]"
*"[[Torch Song]]"
*"[[Twi'lek Dancing Girls]]"

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
